title: salix × polessiae
intro: Salix × polessiae, also known as the Polesie willow, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Salix alba and Salix fragilis. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The leaves and bark of the Polesie willow contain salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin, which provides relief from pain and inflammation. Salix × polessiae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, offering a natural remedy for various health conditions.
